mapper.select: SELECT id, config_id, provider, model_name, display_name, base_url, api_key, status, is_default, sort_order, remark, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_ai_model_config WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, config_id, provider, model_name, display_name, base_url, api_key, status, is_default, sort_order, remark, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_ai_model_config WHERE config_id = #{configId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, config_id, provider, model_name, display_name, base_url, api_key, status, is_default, sort_order, remark, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_ai_model_config WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
